Pulse Labs

Empowering real-time health insights through intelligent mobile experiences

SENIOR IOS ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA · Full-time · $165,000 - $210,000 annually

We're seeking an experienced Senior iOS Engineer with 5-8 years of professional development

experience to lead the architecture and implementation of our next-generation health monitoring

platform. You'll own the full iOS product lifecycle, mentor junior engineers, and collaborate with

product and design teams to deliver seamless user experiences. This role requires deep expertise in

modern Swift development, reactive programming patterns, and iOS app optimization.

ABOUT US

Pulse Labs is a Series B health-tech startup focused on building cutting-edge iOS applications that

help users monitor and optimize their personal health through real-time data visualization and AI-

driven insights. Founded in 2019, we're headquartered in San Francisco and serve over 500,000
active users globally with our flagship health-tracking application.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Design and implement scalable iOS architectures using MVVM and reactive programming

patterns with Combine framework

Lead the development of performance-critical features including real-time health data

synchronization and background processing using Core Data

Architect and maintain the iOS SDK, ensuring clean separation of concerns and robust error
handling across UIKit and SwiftUI implementations

Mentor junior and mid-level iOS engineers through code reviews, architectural discussions, and
hands-on technical guidance

Collaborate with Product and Design teams to translate wireframes into polished, production-

ready SwiftUI implementations

Optimize app performance, manage App Store deployment processes, and ensure compliance

with iOS guidelines

Drive technical debt reduction initiatives and establish iOS best practices within the engineering
team

Participate in on-call rotation for production support and lead post-mortem analyses for critical
issues

REQUIRED

5-8 years of professional iOS development experience with proven track record of shipped
production apps

 Advanced proficiency in Swift and expertise with both UIKit and SwiftUI frameworks

Strong understanding of reactive programming patterns and demonstrated experience with

Combine framework

Experience with Core Data, local persistence, and synchronization strategies for offline-first

applications

Proficiency with Xcode tooling, debugging, and familiarity with performance profiling

instruments

Knowledge of iOS app lifecycle, memory management, and concurrency patterns (GCD,

async/await)

NICE TO HAVE

Experience building healthcare or wellness applications with regulatory awareness (HIPAA,

HL7 standards)

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools (e.g., fastlane, Jenkins)

Proven experience mentoring engineers and contributing to team growth

Understanding of networking stacks and experience integrating REST or GraphQL APIs

TECH STACK

Swift

  SwiftUI

  UIKit

  Combine   Core Data   Xcode   Grand Central Dispatch (GCD)

  URLSession

App Store Connect

Instruments

BENEFITS

Competitive salary and equity package with 4-year vesting schedule

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with 100% premium coverage for
employees

Flexible work arrangements with remote-friendly hybrid setup (3 days in office)

Professional development budget ($3,000 annually) for conferences, courses, and certifications

Generous paid time off (25 days vacation + 10 holidays + unlimited sick leave)

Wellness programs including gym stipend, mental health support, and quarterly wellness
retreats

Parental leave (16 weeks paid for primary caregivers, 12 weeks for secondary)

Mac equipment allowance and latest development hardware

HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume, a brief cover letter describing your experience with iOS
architecture patterns, and a link to your GitHub profile or portfolio showcasing iOS projects to
careers@pulselabs.io. Include specific examples of scalable systems you've designed and teams

you've mentored. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis with interviews beginning
immediately for qualified candidates.
